report.summary: Standup v6: 329 pages live (+4 since v5), Day 35 batch deployed (GXM8trR2v ✅), Day 36 Based Rollups guide live with interactive visualizer, PUBLISH_QUEUE empty, 438-file staged batch pending commit — rate limiter still 0/6 with FOMC T-3 days, organic clicks now arriving (GSC Day 17).

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Last Cycle (v5)
items: Pages live: 325 → 329 (+4 this cycle). Day 35 batch (bittensor-tao-guide + stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026) deployed via GXM8trR2v — both confirmed in PUBLISHED_PAGES. Day 36 page added: /learn/based-rollups-preconfirmations-guide (3,400 words, interactive BasedRollupsVisualizer component) — covers Ethereum preconfirmation UX, based sequencer risks, and the contestable vs. vanilla based rollup spectrum.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (bittensor + stablecoin yield) → promoted Day 35 → now EMPTY. No new items queued yet this cycle. Next queue fill depends on next build cycle.

Staged pipeline: 438 files ready to commit and deploy — crypto-cards hub (31 pages), compare pages (92 pages), courses system (2 pages), badges, airdrops, 4 new API routes (cache-stats, health, newsletter, subscribe). EOD v4 flagged JSON-LD gaps on compare/crypto-cards pages needing SEO validation before publishing.

GSC organic signals: Day 17 — first organic clicks arriving within the 14–21 day indexing window. 329 pages crawlable and indexed. FOMC now T-3 days (Wed Mar 19) — yield/DCA/rate-cut search intent building. Stablecoin yield + DCA + lending-comparison pages are perfectly positioned.

Content delta this cycle: Based Rollups guide (3,400 words) fills an Ethereum scaling narrative gap. Community v17 drafted BTCFi 6-post thread ($7B+ TVL, Babylon/Stacks/Rootstock/BOB), Aave V4 Hub & Spoke thread, Kaito AI/InfoFi drop + FOMC Day prep tweet — social calendar fully loaded through Wednesday.

Design delta: OG images (1200×630 SVG+PNG) for bittensor + stablecoin guides. ToC aria-label accessibility on bittensor page. Mobile table min-width + WebkitOverflowScrolling on 2 pages. Static PNG OGs replacing dynamic /api/og calls.

API health: All 6 routes confirmed healthy (prices 60s TTL, trending 300s, fear-greed 600s, market-metrics 60s, market-dominance 300s, defi-yields 300s). Rate limiter gap unchanged at 0/6 — highest risk ahead of FOMC traffic spike.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ Publish Day 35 — bittensor-tao-guide + stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026 promoted from PUBLISH_QUEUE → PUBLISHED_PAGES. Vercel deploy GXM8trR2v confirmed Ready. PUBLISH_QUEUE cleared.

SHIPPED ✅ Build (Based Rollups) — /learn/based-rollups-preconfirmations-guide scaffolded: 3,400-word guide + BasedRollupsVisualizer.tsx interactive component. Full SEO: title 59 chars, Article + FAQ schemas, 5 internal links, static OG. Added to PUBLISHED_PAGES (Day 36). TS errors unchanged (57, non-blocking).

SHIPPED ✅ Design v4 — OG images for bittensor (indigo/cyan gradient, subnet viz, 4 stat cards) + stablecoin yield guides. ToC aria-label a11y fix. Mobile table scroll CSS. Static PNG OGs switched in for both guides.

SHIPPED ✅ Community v17 — BTCFi 6-post Twitter thread (Mon PM), Aave V4 Hub & Spoke thread + single tweet (Tue), Kaito AI/InfoFi + FOMC prep tweet (Wed), Discord exchange reviews teaser, Thursday newsletter section updated. 2 SVG social cards: social-btcfi-guide-2026.svg + social-aave-v4-guide.svg.
SHIPPED ✅ EOD v4 — Full cycle-close QA: 329 pages validated, 6 API routes healthy, 438 staged files catalogued, no new regressions. JSON-LD gaps flagged on compare/crypto-cards pages.

CARRY-OVER 🔴 Rate limiter — 0/6 public API routes protected. checkRateLimit() exists in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but not wired. FOMC T-3: this is the #1 technical risk. ~30-min programmer task. Delegate to next build cycle immediately.

CARRY-OVER 🔴 438 staged files uncommitted — /src, /public, and new API routes all staged. No .env or secrets detected. Needs: (1) JSON-LD validation on compare/crypto-cards pages, (2) git commit, (3) Vercel deploy. Unlocks potentially 100+ new indexed pages.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required. Blocks gamification + referral hooks across all 329 pages.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min. Blocks Playwright CI before Sprint 60+ merges.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 AICourseRecommendations.tsx — 2 curly apostrophe TS errors (non-blocking). Quick fix queued.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial — ~10 days remaining. Jefe: add payment method.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Wire rate limiter before FOMC (T-3 days). The organic traffic window has opened (GSC Day 17) and FOMC is the highest-traffic catalyst of the month for yield/DCA/staking queries. Six API routes return live data to all 329 pages — if any fail under load, it degrades the entire site simultaneously. Fix: import checkRateLimit() and apply to /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed. ~30 min. Delegate to Build v4 as first task.

PRIORITY 2 — Commit + deploy the 438-file staged batch. This is the largest single content unlock remaining on the roadmap: 92 compare pages + 31 crypto-cards hub pages + courses system. Run SEO validation pass on compare/crypto-cards JSON-LD first (~15 min), then git commit → Vercel deploy. At 329 pages currently, this batch could push us past 450 indexed pages in one deploy — a 37% traffic surface expansion.

PRIORITY 3 — Publish FOMC catalyst content before Wednesday. Build v4 should write one high-priority FOMC-window piece: 'How a Fed rate cut affects crypto yields in 2026' — bridges our DCA calculator, lending-comparison, defi-yields tracker, and stablecoin-yield-strategies guide with rate-decision search intent. T-3 means we have one build window left to get this indexed before the event. Pair with a Community tweet for maximum reach on rate-cut day.
